# Fiscal Policy and Public Finances {#sec-fiscal}

Fiscal policy — government spending and taxation — shapes the macroeconomy alongside monetary policy. This chapter analyses UK public finances using data from the OBR and HMRC.

## UK public finances

## The debt-to-GDP identity

## Fiscal multipliers

## OBR forecasts versus outcomes

## Tax receipts as a real-time indicator

## Exercises

1. Using `obr`, download the Public Finances Databank. Plot the UK debt-to-GDP ratio since 1990. Mark the financial crisis and the pandemic.

2. Compare the OBR's GDP growth forecasts at successive fiscal events. How accurate were they?

3. Using `hmrc`, plot monthly income tax and VAT receipts. Do they lead or lag GDP growth?
